per_criterion_scores.internal_note: The student accurately identifies the key elements of the problem, but could have further clarified the constraints and objectives.
The student demonstrates a good understanding of how the problem relates to sorting and searching algorithms, but could have provided more specific examples and analysis.
The student translates the ill-defined problem into a well-defined task, but could have provided more specific metrics for evaluating the performance of the sorting algorithm.

justification: The student demonstrates a partial understanding of framing, accurately identifying key elements and translating the problem into a well-defined task, but lacks thorough analysis and specific examples in certain areas
